title: Keep the first answer. Ask a second model.
description: A captured Claude session is reconstructed in Pi with Sol 5.6. Alex records the explicit cross-harness fork so the original and independent answer remain connected without pretending they were one model.

steps.label: Claude produces the first answer
steps.detail: The source turn is captured with its model and account provenance

steps.label: Alex reconstructs the verified history
steps.detail: The target receives the prior conversation in provider-native order

steps.label: Sol 5.6 answers in Pi
steps.detail: The second subscription produces a separately attributed turn

steps.label: Both answers remain in one lineage
steps.detail: The target records its source session, harness, model, and fork time

source_contracts: Fork a captured session into a new interactive harness session
